de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm

Class VMTacletMatcher

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.VMTacletMatcher
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TacletMatcher

    public class VMTacletMatcher
extends Object
implements TacletMatcher
    Matching algorithm using a virtual machine based approach inspired by Voronkonv et al. It matches exactly one taclet and does not produce code trees. Instances of this class should not be created directly, use TacletMatcherKit.createTacletMatcher(Taclet) instead.
    See Also:
    TacletMatcherKit

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private HashMap<Term,TacletMatchProgram> assumesMatchPrograms
      the matcher for the taclet's assumes formulas
      private Sequent assumesSequent
      the assumes sequent of the taclet
      private ImmutableSet<QuantifiableVariable> boundVars
      the bound variables
      private Term findExp
      the find expression of the taclet of null if it is a NoFindTaclet
      private TacletMatchProgram findMatchProgram
      the matcher for the find expression of the taclet
      private boolean ignoreTopLevelUpdates
      flag indicating if preceding updates of the term to be matched should be ignored this requires the taclet to ignore updates and that the find term does not start with an UpdateApplication operator
      private ImmutableList<VariableCondition> varconditions
      the variable conditions of the taclet that need to be satisfied by found schema variable instantiations
      private ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn
      the built-in notFreeIn variable conditions

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      MatchConditions checkConditions(MatchConditions cond, Services services)
      checks the provided matches against the variable conditions of this taclet It returns the resulting match conditions or null if the found matches do not satisfy the variable conditions.
      MatchConditions checkVariableConditions(SchemaVariable var, SVSubstitute instantiationCandidate, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      checks if the conditions for a correct instantiation are satisfied
      private Pair<Term,MatchConditions> matchAndIgnoreUpdatePrefix(Term term, MatchConditions matchCond, TermServices services)
      ignores a possible update prefix This method assumes that the taclet allows to ignore updates and the find expression does not start with an update application operator
      MatchConditions matchFind(Term term, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      matches the given term against the taclet's find term if the taclet has no find term or the match is unsuccessful null is returned
      MatchConditions matchIf(Iterable<IfFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch, MatchConditions p_matchCond, Services p_services)
      Match the whole if sequent using the given list of instantiations of all if sequent formulas, starting with the instantiations given by p_matchCond.
      IfMatchResult matchIf(Iterable<IfFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch, Term p_template, MatchConditions p_matchCond, Services p_services)
      (non-Javadoc)
      MatchConditions matchSV(SchemaVariable sv, ProgramElement pe, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      checks whether the given SchemaVariable sv matches the ProgramElement pe w.r.t.
      MatchConditions matchSV(SchemaVariable sv, Term term, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      checks whether the given SchemaVariable sv matches the Term term w.r.t.
      private Term matchUpdateContext(ImmutableList<SVInstantiations.UpdateLabelPair> context, Term formula)
      the formula ensures that the update context described the update of the given formula It it does not null is returned, otherwise the formula without the update context.
      private boolean varDeclaredNotFree(SchemaVariable var)
      looks if a variable is declared as not free in
      private boolean varIsBound(SchemaVariable v)
      returns true iff the given variable is bound either in the ifSequent or in any part of the TacletGoalTemplates

    • Constructor Detail

      • VMTacletMatcher

        public VMTacletMatcher(Taclet taclet)
        Parameters:
        taclet - the Taclet matched by this matcher

    • Method Detail

      • matchIf

        public final IfMatchResult matchIf(Iterable<IfFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch,
                                   Term p_template,
                                   MatchConditions p_matchCond,
                                   Services p_services)
        (non-Javadoc)
        Specified by:
        matchIf in interface TacletMatcher
        Parameters:
        p_toMatch - list of constraint formulas to match p_template to
        p_template - template formula as in "match"
        p_matchCond - already performed instantiations
        p_services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        Two lists (in an IfMatchResult object), containing the the elements of p_toMatch that could successfully be matched against p_template, and the corresponding MatchConditions.
        See Also:
        de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.TacletMatcher#matchIf(java.util.Iterator, de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Term, de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.MatchConditions, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services)

      • matchUpdateContext

        private Term matchUpdateContext(ImmutableList<SVInstantiations.UpdateLabelPair> context,
                                Term formula)
        the formula ensures that the update context described the update of the given formula It it does not null is returned, otherwise the formula without the update context.
        Parameters:
        context - the list of update label pairs describing the update context
        formula - the formula whose own update context must be equal (modulo renaming) to the given one
        Returns:
        null if the update context does not match the one of the formula or the formula without the update context

      • matchIf

        public final MatchConditions matchIf(Iterable<IfFormulaInstantiation> p_toMatch,
                                     MatchConditions p_matchCond,
                                     Services p_services)
        Description copied from interface: TacletMatcher
        Match the whole if sequent using the given list of instantiations of all if sequent formulas, starting with the instantiations given by p_matchCond. PRECONDITION: p_toMatch.size () == ifSequent ().size ()
        Specified by:
        matchIf in interface TacletMatcher
        Returns:
        resulting MatchConditions or null if the given list p_toMatch does not match
        See Also:
        TacletMatcher.matchIf(java.lang.Iterable, de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.MatchConditions, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services)

      • checkConditions

        public final MatchConditions checkConditions(MatchConditions cond,
                                             Services services)
        checks the provided matches against the variable conditions of this taclet It returns the resulting match conditions or null if the found matches do not satisfy the variable conditions. If the given matchconditions are null then null is returned
        Specified by:
        checkConditions in interface TacletMatcher
        Parameters:
        cond - the matches to be checked
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if given matches do not satisfy the taclet's variable conditions

      • varDeclaredNotFree

        private boolean varDeclaredNotFree(SchemaVariable var)
        looks if a variable is declared as not free in
        Parameters:
        var - the SchemaVariable to look for
        Returns:
        true iff declared not free

      • varIsBound

        private boolean varIsBound(SchemaVariable v)
        returns true iff the given variable is bound either in the ifSequent or in any part of the TacletGoalTemplates
        Parameters:
        v - the bound variable to be searched

      • checkVariableConditions

        public final MatchConditions checkVariableConditions(SchemaVariable var,
                                                     SVSubstitute instantiationCandidate,
                                                     MatchConditions matchCond,
                                                     Services services)
        checks if the conditions for a correct instantiation are satisfied
        Specified by:
        checkVariableConditions in interface TacletMatcher
        Parameters:
        var - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
        instantiationCandidate - the SVSubstitute, which is a candidate for a possible instantiation of var
        matchCond - the MatchConditions which have to be respected for the new match
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the Java type model
        Returns:
        the match conditions resulting from matching var with instantiationCandidate or null if a match was not possible

      • matchAndIgnoreUpdatePrefix

        private Pair<Term,MatchConditions> matchAndIgnoreUpdatePrefix(Term term,
                                                              MatchConditions matchCond,
                                                              TermServices services)
        ignores a possible update prefix This method assumes that the taclet allows to ignore updates and the find expression does not start with an update application operator
        Parameters:
        term - the term to be matched
        matchCond - the accumulated match conditions for a successful match
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        a pair of updated match conditions and the unwrapped term without the ignored updates (Which have been added to the update context in the match conditions)

      • matchFind

        public final MatchConditions matchFind(Term term,
                                       MatchConditions matchCond,
                                       Services services)
        matches the given term against the taclet's find term if the taclet has no find term or the match is unsuccessful null is returned
        Specified by:
        matchFind in interface TacletMatcher
        Parameters:
        term - the Term to be matched against the find expression of the taclet
        matchCond - the MatchConditions with side conditions to be satisfied, eg. partial instantiations of schema variables; before calling this method the constraint contained in the match conditions must be ensured to be satisfiable, i.e. matchCond.getConstraint ().isSatisfiable () must return true
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        the found schema variable mapping or null if the matching failed

      • matchSV

        public MatchConditions matchSV(SchemaVariable sv,
                               Term term,
                               MatchConditions matchCond,
                               Services services)
        checks whether the given SchemaVariable sv matches the Term term w.r.t. the constraints (e.g., previous matches of sv) specified in the MatchConditions matchCond
        Specified by:
        matchSV in interface TacletMatcher
        Parameters:
        sv - the SchemaVariable
        term - the Term as a candidate for instantition of sv
        matchCond - the MatchConditions with additional constraints that need to be considered
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        null if the match is not possible or the new MatchConditions with the instantiation sv <- term added

      • matchSV

        public MatchConditions matchSV(SchemaVariable sv,
                               ProgramElement pe,
                               MatchConditions matchCond,
                               Services services)
        checks whether the given SchemaVariable sv matches the ProgramElement pe w.r.t. the constraints (e.g., previous matches of sv) specified in the MatchConditions matchCond
        Specified by:
        matchSV in interface TacletMatcher
        Parameters:
        sv - the SchemaVariable
        matchCond - the MatchConditions with additional constraints that need to be considered
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        null if the match is not possible or the new MatchConditions with the instantiation sv <- term added
